name: Subsurface Surveyor
reasoning: V1 best matches the prompt with a lean scout in a proper crouching pose with one hand steadying against stone, rope coils visible at the belt, and alert eyes focused downward. The cool steel-blue and teal palette is perfectly executed with excellent screen-glow lighting on the torch. V2 has a watermark artifact in the bottom right corner and the pose is less dynamic (standing rather than crouching). V3 has the character in a crouch but the pose is less natural and the composition feels more cramped with the large dark cavern entrance dominating the frame.

artifacts_found.issue: Watermark/text artifact visible in bottom right corner
Composition too dark with oversized cavern entrance reducing character visibility at card size
